# Nicole James

> Licensed Real Estate Agent specializing in downtown Austin condominium towers. Licensed in Texas since 2007, Christie's International Real Estate Luxury Specialist since 2020, with over 90 units closed at Bridges on The Park. Represents buyers and sellers through @properties Lone Star / Christie's International Real Estate, from 1105 N. Lamar Blvd, Austin, TX 78703.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://nicolejamesaustin.com/): Full overview of services, record, testimonials, and credentials
- [Journal](https://nicolejamesaustin.com/journal/): Building profiles, market analysis, and FAQ on downtown Austin condos
- [Contact](https://nicolejamesaustin.com/contact.html): Direct phone, email, office address, and inquiry form

## Journal entries

- [HOA Fees, Compared](https://nicolejamesaustin.com/journal/hoa-fees-compared.html): What residents in five downtown Austin buildings actually pay each month and what the fees cover
- [Capitol View Corridor](https://nicolejamesaustin.com/journal/capitol-view-corridor.html): What the downtown Austin capitol view corridor regulation means for condo buyers
- [Bridges on The Park Pricing](https://nicolejamesaustin.com/journal/bridges-pricing-history.html): How pricing at Bridges on The Park has moved from 2015 through 2026

## Key facts about Nicole James

- Licensed Real Estate Agent, State of Texas, TREC License #549414
- Licensed since 2007 (19 years in practice as of 2026)
- Austin Business Journal Top 50 Residential Real Estate Agents nominee: 2011, 2012, 2014
- Christie's International Real Estate Luxury Specialist, 2020
- Over 90 units sold at Bridges on The Park
- Resident of 5th & West Residences, downtown Austin
- Member: Austin Board of REALTORS, Texas REALTORS, National Association of REALTORS, Downtown Austin Neighborhood Association
- Education: University of Houston
- Brokerage: @properties Lone Star / Christie's International Real Estate
- Office: 1105 N. Lamar Blvd, Suite 100, Austin, TX 78703
- Phone: 512-466-4608
- Email: nicolej@christiesrealestatels.com
